description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs with AOT that triggers on push with any tag. For the repository owned by ant-design-blazor, run a ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, sets up .NET Core 3.1, 5.0, and 6.0, and Node.js 10.x, then prepares the AOT workload, publishes the docs, and deploys to GitHub Pages, Github.io, and Gitee.
